examples.input: John is a teacher of innovation and entrepreneurship training courses. He schedules training sessions every weekday from 10:00 to 18:00, with a one-hour lunch break. Starting from next Monday morning, he plans to arrange the courses in the following order: Innovation Methods requires 5 hours, Entrepreneurship Project Planning requires 10 hours, and Business Model requires 4 hours. On which day of the week will he finish the Business Model course?

Alice is traveling in Pittsburgh. She is currently visiting the Pittsburgh Zoo and plans to go to the Pittsburgh Museum of Art later. It is now 13:00. She will spend half an hour having a meal and another half an hour on the way. What is the earliest time she can arrive at the Pittsburgh Museum of Art?

Emily wants to eat Seoul’s famous barbecue. She is currently shopping near Myeongdong and plans to continue shopping for about one more hour. It is now 16:00. It will take her another half an hour to get to the restaurant from where she is. When will she be able to arrive at the restaurant?

Linda is a writer, and her working hours on weekdays are from 10:00 to 19:00. Her daily work schedule is as follows: writing new chapters or paragraphs takes 4 hours, editing and revising the content written the previous day takes 1 hour, organizing and structuring the storyline or content takes 1 hour, and conducting market and competitor analysis takes 3 hours. At what time does she finish organizing and structuring the storyline or content?

If I am to attend a short-term painting training course next week, with classes held from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM on each working day, starting next Monday morning, and the lessons are scheduled in the following order: learning lines requires 6 hours, learning color requires 11 hours, and learning perspective requires 8 hours, then on which day of the week will the perspective lesson be completed?

Amy now has 60 days to prepare for the FRM exam. Among them, 5 days are allocated for mock exams, 5 days for financial markets and products, 10 days for quantitative analysis of financial risk, and 20 days for risk management and investment management. How many days can she spend practicing valuation and risk models?

Kevin gets up at 10:00 in the morning. He attends classes at school from 10:00 to 12:00, spends time at the church from 15:00 to 19:00, and stays at Luke’s house from 20:00 to 23:00. He goes to bed at 23:00. If he wants to play basketball for three hours, which time period is most suitable?

I am a writer, and my working hours on weekdays are from 10:00 to 16:00. Starting next Monday, I plan to do the following tasks in order: gathering inspiration and ideas takes 4 hours, writing new chapters or paragraphs takes 8 hours, making notes and outlines takes 6 hours, and conducting self-assessment and reflection takes 3 hours. On which day of the week will I finish conducting self-assessment and reflection?

Fiona is a community worker with 5 days next week to organize a community event. The event requires: 1 day for planning and preparation, half a day for volunteer team communication and training, half a day for community resident interaction, and half a day for compiling event data and feedback. How many days remain for addressing community residents' concerns or providing other assistance?

If I have 90 days to prepare for the TOEFL exam, with 7 days allocated for mock exams, 20 days for listening, 15 days for writing, and 20 days for reading, how many days can I spend practicing speaking?

My younger brother got up at 8:00 this morning. He has a math class from 9:30 to 12:00, takes a lunch break from 12:00 to 15:00, has an English class from 15:00 to 17:00, and plays games from 20:00 to 22:00. He goes to bed at 22:00. Today, he needs to play a three-hour football match. Which time period is most suitable?

An academic seminar is usually divided into several sessions, including the opening ceremony, keynote speech, group discussion, academic report, and academic interaction. If Lily organizes an academic seminar scheduled from 10:00 to 18:00, with the opening ceremony lasting 1 hour, group discussion 1 hour, lunch break 1 hour, academic report 3 hours, and keynote speech 1 hour, how many hours are allocated for academic interaction?

Linda now has 50 days to prepare for the ACT exam. Among them, 10 days are allocated for mock exams, 10 days for English, 7 days for mathematics, and 15 days for reading. How many days can she spend practicing scientific reasoning?

Karen is an IT teacher. She schedules training sessions every weekday from 10:00 to 18:00. Starting next Monday morning, she plans to arrange the courses in the following order: Basic Computer Knowledge requires 8 hours, Programming Languages requires 4 hours, and Data Analysis requires 10 hours. On which day of the week will she finish the Data Analysis course?

Today is August 1st. Lillian ordered baby towels, which will arrive in 5 days. The baby bottles she ordered will arrive in 8 days, and the baby formula she purchased will arrive in 3 days. By which day will she be able to have all of the above baby products ready?

Sophia is a wedding planner and has 5 days available. Selecting and confirming the wedding ceremony and banquet venue requires 1 day. Booking a wedding planning company or team requires half a day. Starting the process of wedding dress fitting and customization requires half a day. Choosing and purchasing wedding rings and bands requires 1 day. Confirming guests’ accommodation and transportation arrangements requires half a day. Arranging the wedding venue setup and table layout requires half a day. How many days does she have to book the photographer and videographer?

Ethan is planning a five-day volunteer event. Among these, publicity takes 1 day, charity sale and fundraising activities take half a day, arranging staff and resources takes half a day, and feedback and celebration with the volunteer team take half a day. How many days does he have left for evaluation and improvement?

Lila is a teacher of communication and expression training courses. She schedules training sessions every weekday from 10:00 to 18:00. Starting next Monday morning, she plans to arrange the courses in the following order: Effective Communication requires 6 hours, Interpersonal Relationship Management requires 12 hours, and Public Speaking Skills requires 7 hours. On which day of the week will she finish the Public Speaking Skills course?

Lily got up at 9:00 today. She worked at the bakery from 9:00 to 12:00, had lunch from 12:00 to 13:00, worked at the café from 15:00 to 19:00, went home from 19:00 to 20:00, played games alone at home until 23:00, and then went to bed. Luke and Lily attended a two-hour dance class together. During which time period did they have the class?

Today I need to go to my grandmother’s house to take care of her kitten. The round trip will take 2 hours, feeding the kitten will take half an hour, grooming the kitten will take half an hour, and playing with the kitten will take 1 hour. If I want to return home around 18:00, what is the latest time I should leave?

Linda has an urgent meeting and needs to travel quickly from location A to location B on the same day. The meeting starts at 17:00 on the 21st, and the airline tickets are sold out. She plans to take the train, which has three departures each day: 8:00 in the morning, 12:00 at noon, and 16:00 in the afternoon. The train journey takes approximately 7 hours. It takes 1 hour by car from the train station to the meeting venue, and Linda needs to reserve 1 hour for preparation after arriving in location B. It is now 6:00 on the 21st. What is the latest train departure she must catch?
examples.target: The 8:00 a.m. train on that day.

examples.input: Emily is a wedding planner and has 4 days available. Planning the wedding banquet menu and beverages takes half a day, booking the wedding car and transportation services takes half a day, ordering the wedding cake and desserts takes half a day, arranging the wedding rehearsal and customizing the ceremony music takes 1 day, and completing the wedding certificate and marriage registration procedures takes half a day. How many days does she have to confirm the process and sequence of the wedding ceremony?

Catherine plans to go to Walmart for family shopping this Sunday. She has 2 hours to select items and check out in the supermarket. Among these, selecting vegetables takes half an hour, selecting meat takes half an hour, and checking out takes half an hour. How many hours does she have left to shop for household goods?

I am planning to obtain permanent residency in the United Kingdom. Today is January 20th. Submitting the application takes 2 months, attending the interview takes 1 month, and providing documents and undergoing medical examinations takes 6 months. What is the earliest date I can obtain permanent residency in the United Kingdom?

Dr. Smith’s neurology department is holding an academic seminar this Sunday from 10:00 to 16:00. Lunch is scheduled from 12:00 to 13:00, the opening ceremony and keynote speech are from 10:00 to 11:00, the academic interaction session is from 13:00 to 14:00, the banquet or social activity is from 14:00 to 15:30, and the closing ceremony is from 15:30 to 16:00. At what time is the academic report scheduled?

Linda is a wedding planner and has 5 days available. Completing the wedding certificate and marriage registration procedures takes half a day, starting the process of wedding dress fitting and customization takes half a day, customizing the honeymoon itinerary takes 1 day, confirming guests’ accommodation and transportation arrangements takes 1 day, and arranging the wedding venue setup and table layout takes half a day. How many days does she have to confirm the wedding host?

If I am to attend a short-term fitness training course next week, with training sessions scheduled from 10:00 to 18:00 on each working day, starting next Monday morning and following this sequence: aerobic exercise requires 3 hours, strength training requires 2 hours, and flexibility development and core stability training require 4 hours, on which day of the week will I complete the flexibility development and core stability training?

My family and I want to immigrate to France. Today is January 5th. It takes 1 month to learn about immigration policies, 1 month to submit the application and prepare materials, 3 months to wait for the immigration office to process and review the application, and 4 months for the visa to be issued. What is the earliest date we can immigrate to France?

If it is now 10:00, feeding my rabbit takes half an hour, cleaning the rabbit hutch takes half an hour, and playing with the rabbit takes 1 hour. What is the earliest time I can finish all these tasks?

If Linda has 30 days to prepare for the Chinese Proficiency Test, with 5 days allocated for speaking practice, 5 days for listening, 10 days for writing, and 5 days for reading, how many days does she have for mock exams?

William's computer science department is holding an academic seminar this Saturday from 10:00 to 17:00. Lunch is scheduled from 11:00 to 12:00, the opening ceremony and keynote speech are from 10:00 to 11:00, the academic interaction session is from 12:00 to 14:00, the banquet or social activity is from 14:00 to 15:00, and the closing ceremony is from 16:30 to 17:00. At what time is the academic presentation scheduled?

Rosie is a massage instructor. She schedules training sessions every weekday from 10:00 to 17:00. Starting next Monday morning, she plans to arrange the courses in the following order: Basic Massage Techniques requires 5 hours, Explanation of Common Conditions and Massage Treatments requires 4 hours, Practice of Massage Skills requires 10 hours, and Massage Conditioning and Wellness requires 4 hours. On which day of the week will she start the Massage Conditioning and Wellness course?

Susan is a writer, and her working hours on weekdays are from 11:00 to 20:00. Her daily work schedule is as follows: writing new chapters or paragraphs takes 6 hours, editing and revising the content written the previous day takes 1 hour, organizing and structuring the storyline or content takes 1 hour, and conducting market and competitor analysis takes 1 hour. At what time does she finish organizing and structuring the storyline or content?

I plan to go to Costco for family shopping this Sunday. We have 4 hours in the supermarket for shopping, dining, and checking out. Among these, buying vegetables takes half an hour, buying meat takes half an hour, dining takes 1 hour, buying daily necessities takes half an hour, and checking out takes half an hour. How many hours are available for purchasing household goods?

My company is 2.5 km away from my home. I want to exercise, so I have decided to walk to and from work every day. My walking speed is 5 kilometers per hour. Every morning, I also need to spend 15 minutes having breakfast, 10 minutes organizing personal items, and 15 minutes cleaning the room. I need to arrive at the company before 8:30. What is the latest time I can get up each day to ensure I arrive at the company on time?

If my younger sister has 60 days to prepare for the MCAT exam, with 7 days allocated for biological sciences, 10 days for physical sciences, 15 days for social sciences, and 15 days for critical analysis, how many days can she spend studying reasoning skills?

Sophia's expected due date is October 2nd, and she hopes to have her maternity bag ready before then. Today is August 2nd. The baby bottles she ordered will arrive in 5 days, the baby formula she ordered will arrive in 3 days, and the postpartum pants she purchased will arrive in 4 days. By which day will she be able to have all of the above maternal and baby products ready?

Jason gets up at 10:00 in the morning. From 11:00 to 15:00, he visits Luke’s house. From 18:00 to 22:00, he works at the church. From 22:00 to 23:00, he has dinner, and he goes to bed at 23:00. If Jason wants to watch a three-hour performance, which time period is most suitable?

Emily is planning a 6-day volunteer event. It takes 2 days to contact relevant agencies and partners, half a day to assign specific roles and tasks to volunteers, 1 day to organize staff and resources, and 1 day for promotion. How many days are left for feedback and celebration with the volunteer team?

My due date is October 20, and I want to have all my maternity and baby essentials ready before then. Today is September 20. The bassinet I ordered needs 15 days to arrive. My baby bottles will be here next week. The postpartum underwear and sanitary pads will take 10 days to arrive, and the formula is also arriving next week. By what date will I have all these items ready?

If I am attending a short photography training course next week with sessions held from 10:00 to 18:00 on weekdays, and the course begins next Tuesday morning in the following order: "Selection and Usage of Photography Equipment" takes 8 hours, "Composition and Framing" takes 6 hours, and "Lighting Control and Post-processing" takes 8 hours, on which day will I finish the "Lighting Control and Post-processing" module?

I am a mobile pet care specialist scheduled to visit a client's home to tend to a kitten. The round-trip commute takes 1 hour. It takes 1 hour to check the kitten's ears, eyes, and teeth, 1 hour to groom its coat, and 1 hour for deworming. If I aim to return home by 17:00, what is the latest time I should leave?
If I have 30 days to prepare for the IELTS exam, with 8 days allocated to Speaking, 7 days to Writing, 5 days to Reading, and 7 days to mock exams, how many days are left for Listening practice?

Rachel is a writer with working hours from 9:00 to 17:00 on weekdays. Her daily workflow typically follows this sequence: writing new chapters or paragraphs takes 5 hours, note-taking and outlining takes 1 hour, conducting research and interviews takes 1 hour, and self-assessment and reflection takes 1 hour. At what time does she complete the research and interviews?

Sarah is a wedding planner with a 6-day schedule. It takes 1 day to book wedding music and performers, half a day to finalize floral and decoration plans, half a day to arrange wedding cars and transportation, 1 day to book the photographer and videographer, and 2 days to confirm venue and hotel details. How many days are left to finalize the flow and sequence of the wedding ceremony?

David and his classmate are going to IKEA for back-to-school shopping. They have 4 hours to shop, dine, and check out. Selecting tableware takes 1 hour, dining takes 1 hour, choosing bedding takes half an hour, and checking out takes half an hour. How many hours are available for purchasing furniture?

Kim is a leadership training instructor whose sessions run from 10:00 to 18:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, she schedules the course modules in the following order: "Leadership Concepts" takes 9 hours, "Leadership Styles" takes 7 hours, and "Team Leadership" takes 18 hours. On which day will the "Team Leadership" module be completed?

Stanford University is organizing an academic conference this Saturday from 10:00 to 17:00. The lunch break is from 12:00 to 14:00. The opening ceremony and keynote speeches take place from 10:00 to 11:00, the academic review session is from 14:00 to 15:30, the networking session is from 15:30 to 16:30, and the closing ceremony is from 16:30 to 17:00. When is the academic exchange scheduled?

Hannah is planning a 3-day volunteer event. It takes half a day to contact relevant agencies and partners, half a day to assign specific roles and tasks to volunteers, half a day to organize staff and resources, and half a day for promotion. How many days are available for evaluation and improvement?

I am planning to obtain Singapore Permanent Residency. Today is February 1. Researching immigration policies takes 1 month, preparing materials and submitting the application takes 1 month, waiting for acceptance and review by the immigration authorities takes 3 months, and visa issuance takes 1 month. What is the earliest date I can obtain Singapore Permanent Residency?

Lily has 30 days to prepare for the PMP exam. Project Initiation takes 5 days, Project Planning takes 5 days, Project Execution takes 7 days, and Project Monitoring and Controlling takes 10 days. How many days are available for her to study Project Closing?

Stanford University is organizing an academic seminar this Saturday from 9:00 to 17:00. The lunch break is from 12:00 to 14:00. The opening ceremony and keynote speeches take place from 9:00 to 10:00, the academic review session is from 14:00 to 15:30, the networking session is from 15:30 to 16:30, and the closing ceremony is from 16:30 to 17:00. When is the academic discussion likely scheduled?

Jessica has 30 days to prepare for the Japanese N2 exam. She has allocated 5 days for Vocabulary, 10 days for Listening, and 10 days for Reading. How many days are available for her to practice Grammar?

Vanessa is an education instructor whose training sessions run from 10:00 to 17:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, she schedules the modules in the following order: "Educational Theory" takes 5 hours, "Instructional Design" takes 4 hours, and "Teaching Assessment" takes 5 hours. On which day does the "Teaching Assessment" module begin?

I am planning to travel from London for an internship in Hong Kong, which starts on November 30. To ensure the trip goes smoothly, I need to create a detailed schedule for my preparations.

First, I need to apply for a visa (estimated to take 2 weeks). Next, I need to book round-trip flights (estimated 1 day) and find suitable short-term accommodation (estimated 7 days). Additionally, I need to set aside one week before the internship begins to familiarize myself with Hong Kong's transportation system and living environment. During the internship, I plan to visit local attractions on weekends, and I intend to spend a week exploring Hong Kong in depth after the internship concludes.

What is the latest date I must start applying for my visa?
examples.target: I should start applying for the visa on November 1.

examples.input: If Becky has 25 days to prepare for the GRE exam, allocating 5 days for mock exams, 8 days for Verbal, and 7 days for Writing, how many days remain for her to study Math?

Jane is a writer with working hours from 10:00 to 19:00 on weekdays. Her daily workflow follows this sequence: writing new chapters or paragraphs takes 4 hours, note-taking and outlining takes 2 hours, organizing the plot or content structure takes 1 hour, and conducting market and competitive analysis takes 2 hours. At what time does she complete organizing the plot or content structure?

Chloe has always wanted to try French bread. She is currently sightseeing near the Eiffel Tower. It is 15:00, and she expects to spend another 2 hours there. The travel time from the Eiffel Tower to the bakery is 1 hour. At what time will she arrive at the bakery?

If I am attending a digital marketing training course next week with sessions held from 10:00 to 18:00 on weekdays, and the course begins next Tuesday morning in the following order: "Search Engine Optimization" takes 6 hours, "Social Media Marketing" takes 6 hours, and "Email Marketing" takes 9 hours, on which day will I finish the "Email Marketing" module?

Wendy and her sister are going shopping at IKEA this Friday. They have 4 hours to shop, dine, and check out. Selecting tableware takes half an hour, dining takes 1 hour, choosing bedding takes half an hour, and checking out takes half an hour. How much time is left for them to spend freely?

Ava is a writer with working hours from 9:00 to 18:00 on weekdays. Her daily workflow follows this sequence: writing new chapters or paragraphs takes 5 hours, editing and revising the previous day's work takes 2 hours, organizing the plot or content structure takes 1 hour, and conducting market and competitive analysis takes 1 hour. At what time does she complete organizing the plot or content structure?

The weather has been delightful recently, perfect for a leisurely getaway. I plan to travel to Singapore, and I have a five-day vacation. First, booking flights and hotels will take approximately half a day. Next, packing luggage and preparing travel essentials will require another half a day. The round-trip journey will consume a total of one day. Upon arrival in Singapore, I will need half a day to familiarize myself with the local transportation and accommodation. I plan to spend the remaining time visiting major attractions and enjoying local cuisine. How much time is available for sightseeing and dining?

I am scheduled to attend a short-term training course on Innovative Thinking and Creativity next week. The sessions are held from 10:00 to 16:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, the course will proceed in the following sequence: Brainstorming takes 9 hours, and Design Thinking takes 2 hours. On which day of the week will the Design Thinking module be completed?

Arthur is a writer whose working hours are from 10:00 to 20:00 on weekdays. His daily schedule proceeds in the following order: writing new chapters or paragraphs takes 5 hours, editing and revising the previous day's work takes 2 hours, conducting literary research or reading relevant works takes 1 hour, and conducting market and competitive analysis takes 2 hours. At what time does he complete the literary research or reading task?

I am scheduled to attend a short-term training course on Data Analysis next week. The sessions are held from 10:00 to 18:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, the course will proceed in the following sequence: Data Collection takes 6 hours, Data Cleaning takes 12 hours, and Data Analysis and Visualization takes 8 hours. On which day of the week will the Data Analysis and Visualization module be completed?

I am planning to obtain Australian Permanent Residency. Assuming today is January 1st, researching immigration policies takes 1 month, submitting an Expression of Interest (EOI) takes 3 months, waiting for acceptance and review takes 3 months, and visa issuance takes 3 months. What is the earliest date I can obtain Australian Permanent Residency?

I am scheduled to attend a short-term training course on Baking next week. The sessions are held from 10:00 to 18:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, the course will proceed in the following sequence: Dough Preparation takes 5 hours, Oven Temperature Control takes 4 hours, and Decoration Techniques takes 5 hours. On which day of the week will the Decoration Techniques module take place?

Sarah is planning a four-day volunteer event. Setting up and preparing the venue requires 1 day, assigning specific roles and tasks to volunteers takes half a day, addressing residents' concerns or providing assistance takes half a day, and conducting publicity takes half a day. How much time remains available for evaluation and improvement?

If Lisa has 80 days to prepare for an exam, with 20 days allocated to Reading Comprehension, 20 days to Analytical Reasoning, and 15 days to Logical Reasoning, how many days are available for practicing Writing?

Claire is a community worker with five days next week to organize a community event. Planning and preparing the event details and schedule requires 1 day, assigning specific roles and tasks to volunteers takes 1 day, interacting with community residents takes 1 day, and compiling event data and feedback takes half a day. How many days remain available for publicity?

If it's currently 12:00, I have several tasks to do for my pet. Brushing and bathing will take 1 hour, drying the fur will take half an hour, pet grooming will take 1.5 hours, and playing with my pet will take another hour. What is the earliest time I will be finished?

Chloe plans to go to Costco for back-to-school shopping this week. She has 3 hours of free time. Purchasing household items takes half an hour, buying fruit takes half an hour, having a meal takes 1 hour, and checking out takes half an hour. How many hours are available for purchasing stationery?

Eva is a sales skills training instructor. Her training sessions are scheduled from 10:00 to 18:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, she arranges the course in the following order: Market Research takes 8 hours, Market Positioning takes 12 hours, Brand Promotion takes 6 hours, and Marketing Strategy takes 8 hours. On which day of the week will the Marketing Strategy module be completed?

Lily visited IKEA and stayed for a total of 3 hours. Selecting tableware took half an hour, dining took half an hour, and checking out took half an hour. How many hours did she spend purchasing furniture?

My roommate’s semester starts on August 25th, and he plans to travel from New York to Los Angeles for school. He only has three days left before classes begin. First, he will spend one day buying plane tickets and packing his luggage. Next, he will spend half a day handling various pre-departure matters. Then, the trip to the airport, security checks, and the flight itself are expected to take a total of one day. After arriving in Los Angeles, he will need half a day to complete enrollment procedures and settle into his accommodation. So, how much time does he have left to get familiar with the campus and prepare for classes?

An academic seminar typically consists of an opening ceremony, keynote speeches, group discussions, academic presentations, and interactive sessions. If Vivian schedules the seminar from 10:00 to 18:00, including a 1-hour lunch break, 1 hour for group discussions, 2 hours for academic presentations, 2 hours for interactive sessions, and 1 hour for keynote speeches, how many hours remain for the opening ceremony?

The distance from my home to the office is 0.5 km, and walking to work takes 10 minutes. In the morning, I need 15 minutes for breakfast, 10 minutes to wash up and get dressed, and 5 minutes to pack work essentials. Upon arriving at the office, I need 5 minutes to clock in and organize my desk. If I want to start working promptly at 9:00, what is the latest time I need to wake up?

Jack leaves home at 9:00. He works at McDonald's from 9:00 to 15:00 and at KFC from 18:00 to 22:00. At 22:00, he spends one hour commuting home and goes to sleep at 23:00. If Jack spends three hours working out, during which time slot does this occur?

Jill has 40 days to prepare for the CMA exam. She will spend 5 days on mock exams, 5 days on Financial Planning, and 15 days on Performance and Control. How many days does she have left to practice Financial Decision Making?

I plan to travel from Hong Kong to Tokyo for a vacation. I have ample time, but I want to plan my itinerary carefully.

First, I need 1 day to book my flight and pack my luggage. Next, I plan to spend 2 days visiting the city's main attractions. Then, I want to spend 1 day at Tokyo Disneyland. Finally, I need 1 day for shopping and trying the local food. If my trip is 7 days in total, how many days do I have left for other activities?

Luke wakes up at 9:00 every morning. He spends one hour on breakfast from 9:00 to 10:00, attends Science class from 10:00 to 12:00, and has lunch from 12:00 to 13:00. He then takes a two-hour nap. From 15:00 to 17:00, he attends History class, and from 17:00 to 20:00, he attends Dance class. He goes to sleep at 23:00. If he also spent three hours at church, during which time slot was this most likely?

I am going to my teacher's house today to take care of a puppy. The round-trip commute takes 2 hours, feeding the dog takes half an hour, grooming the dog's fur takes half an hour, and playing with the dog takes 1 hour. If I want to return home around 16:00, what is the latest time I should leave?

If it is currently 9:00 and I plan to do a deep clean of my apartment today: cleaning the dining table takes 1 hour, mopping the floor takes 1 hour, removing mites takes 1 hour, wiping furniture takes 1 hour, and disinfecting takes 2 hours. What is the earliest time I can finish?

My sister wakes up at 9:00. She attends Math class from 9:00 to 11:00, Literature class from 13:00 to 15:00, and English class from 16:00 to 18:00. She has dinner from 19:00 to 20:00, plays video games from 21:00 to 22:00, and goes to sleep at 22:00. If my sister took a two-hour exam, when did it take place?

Lily is planning a seven-day volunteer event. Communicating with and training the volunteer team takes 1.5 days, assigning specific roles and tasks to volunteers takes half a day, arranging staff and resources takes 2 days, and conducting publicity takes half a day. How many days remain available for evaluation and improvement?

Jane is a writer whose working hours are from 10:00 to 18:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday, she plans to perform the following tasks in this order: reading and researching relevant topics or materials to gain inspiration and viewpoints (5 hours), writing new chapters or paragraphs (15 hours), editing and revising the previous day's content to check for errors and fluency (1 hour), taking notes and outlining to organize the plot or content structure (9 hours), and conducting writing research and interviews to gain more information and viewpoints (10 hours). On which day of the week does she start conducting writing research and interviews?

Shawn is a financial management training instructor. His training sessions are scheduled from 10:00 to 17:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, he arranges the course in the following order: Financial Statement Analysis takes 7 hours, Budget Management takes 7 hours, and Investment Decision Making takes 15 hours. On which day of the week will the Investment Decision Making module be completed?

Millie is a sales skills training instructor. Her training sessions are scheduled from 10:00 to 17:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, she arranges the course in the following order: Sales Communication Skills takes 8 hours, Customer Relationship Management takes 12 hours, and Sales Negotiation takes 5 hours. On which day of the week will the Sales Negotiation module be completed?

I am scheduled to attend a short-term training course on Boxing next week. The sessions are held from 10:00 to 17:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, the course will proceed in the following sequence: Basic Boxing Techniques takes 6 hours, Defensive Skills takes 6 hours, and Improving Physical Fitness and Coordination takes 6 hours. On which day of the week will the Improving Physical Fitness and Coordination module be completed?

Zoe, a community worker, has five days next week to organize a community event. Contacting relevant agencies and partners takes 2 days, communicating with and training the volunteer team takes half a day, interacting with community residents takes half a day, and assigning specific roles and tasks to volunteers takes half a day. How many days remain available for addressing residents' concerns or providing assistance?

Jane is a writer whose working hours are from 10:00 to 20:00 on weekdays. Her daily schedule proceeds in the following order: writing new chapters or paragraphs takes 5 hours, editing and revising the previous day's work takes 2 hours, organizing the plot or content structure takes 1 hour, and conducting market and competitive analysis takes 2 hours. At what time does she complete the task of organizing the plot or content structure?

I am visiting Tokyo, Japan with my mother. We are sightseeing in Ginza and will spend another half hour here. She wants to eat sushi. It takes about 1 hour to travel from here to the restaurant. It is currently 16:00, and there is a 1-hour queue. At what time will she be able to get into the restaurant?

Mr. Wilson is on vacation in Portland, viewing flowers at the Rose Garden. He plans to visit the Oregon Museum of Science and Industry shortly. It is currently 12:00. The journey is expected to take 1 hour, and he also needs 1 hour for lunch. What is the earliest time he can arrive at the Oregon Museum of Science and Industry?

Amy currently has 25 days to prepare for a Spanish proficiency exam. Listening takes 2 days, Reading takes 8 days, Writing takes 5 days, and Speaking takes 5 days. How many days are available for mock exams?
examples.target: 5 days are available for mock exams

examples.input: I am scheduled to attend a short-term training course on Manufacturing Management next week. The sessions are held from 10:00 to 18:00 on weekdays. Starting next Monday morning, the course will proceed in the following sequence: Production Planning and Control takes 7 hours, Quality Management takes 12 hours, and Supply Chain Management takes 6 hours. On which day of the week will the Supply Chain Management module be completed?

Jane leaves home at 11:00. She attends Math class from 11:00 to 13:00, Computer class from 16:00 to 18:00, participates in club activities from 18:00 to 20:00, and returns home at 20:00. If Lily and Jane played basketball together for three hours, during which time slot did this occur?
Answer: 13:00 - 16:00

John is a Sam's Club member and plans to do a big weekend shop this Sunday. He has 4 hours to spend in the supermarket. If we wish to return to the hotel by 5:00 p.m., what is the latest time we need to leave Central Park for Times Square?
examples.target: Leave Central Park for Times Square by 14:30 at the latest

examples.input: I woke up late this morning. My office is 10 km away, and I only have 20 minutes before I am late. Walking to the subway station takes 10 minutes, and the ride takes 47 minutes.
